description: DarkFactory configurable enforcement rules. Evaluated by df-work and df-follow-through as merge/action gates. Rules are declarative and extensible: new gates can be added by declaring a supported gate type with parameters, and new gate types can be registered in the rule engine without changing the schema.

rules.message: All required checks must be success before merging.
DarkFactory never bypasses branch protection or admin gates.
DarkFactory redacts secrets from logs and comments.
DarkFactory must not act on parked repositories.
DarkFactory work PRs must target the dev branch where it exists.
